title: epipactis maricae
intro: Epipactis maricae, also known as the Marica's helleborine, is a rare species of orchid found in the Iberian Peninsula. It is believed to have medicinal properties due to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, thanks to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Epipactis maricae can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
